creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
The supplied patch appears to remove some logic between check_radius  
and check_ldap in the configure.in script which prevents check_ldap  
from being built and installed unless check_radius is enabled.

Please commit the following to bump net-mgmt/nagios-plugins to 1.4.10:
http://www.netleader.com.au/~jarrod/FreeBSD/net-mgmt-nagios- 
plugins-1.4.10.diff

Jarrod.
